OTR (Occupational Therapist Registered) National License
NBCOT® OTR Exam National Exam

Endorsement States

16

Requires a separate board application with fee and processing time.

State Timeline Extra steps Fee
Alaska 4 to 6 Weeks FingerprintsPSV $350 California 6 to 8 Weeks FingerprintsPSV $150 Connecticut 4 to 6 Weeks FingerprintsPSV $200 District of Columbia 4 to 6 Weeks FingerprintsPSV $314 Florida 4 to 6 Weeks FingerprintsExam $180 Hawaii 4 to 6 Weeks FingerprintsPSV $279 Illinois 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $25 Massachusetts 4 to 6 Weeks FingerprintsPSV $265 Michigan 4 to 6 Weeks FingerprintsPSV $187 Nevada 3 to 5 Business Days FingerprintsExam $500 New Jersey 7 to 10 Weeks FingerprintsPSV $260 New Mexico 2 to 4 Weeks FingerprintsExamPSV $110 New York 6 to 8 Weeks FingerprintsPSV $294 Oregon 1 to 2 Weeks FingerprintsExam $330 Pennsylvania 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $30 Rhode Island 4 to 6 Weeks FingerprintsPSV $140

How to use this directory

Start with the path filter to narrow by compact, endorsement, or CDR. Sort by fee or speed to find your fastest or cheapest route. Open any state to see the full board-verified guide with steps, documents, and renewal info.
